---
name: grill-with-docs
description: Interrogate a plan against repository documentation and decisions to surface contradictions and gaps. Use when making high-impact design or process choices.
---

# grill-with-docs

## Workflow

1. Identify the target plan or decision.
2. Read relevant docs first: `GOVERNANCE.md`, `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `docs/decisions/`, and related component docs.
3. Ask one question at a time, each linked to a specific doc constraint.
4. Highlight inconsistencies, missing decisions, and operational risks.
5. Recommend doc updates when gaps are confirmed.

## Output

Deliver a decision-ready summary: keep, revise, or reject plan and why.
